markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To explore a potential partnership for Prospeo's AI search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Prospeo's Strategy:** A hyper-focused programmatic SEO play (100M+ pages) to capture high-intent, long-tail search traffic (e.g., "first name last name").](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Model:** An end-to-end content agency where AI search visibility (GEO) is a direct outcome of creating high-quality editorial content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [**Strategic Mismatch:** Prospeo's strategy explicitly avoids editorial content, as it would be outranked by the programmatic pages and negatively impact Google's perception of the site.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [**Outcome:** No partnership. GrowthX's model is incompatible with Prospeo's content-free strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

## Topics

### Prospeo's Strategy: Programmatic SEO

  - [Prospeo is launching v2 of its product, shifting from contact enrichment to lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [The core marketing strategy is programmatic SEO:](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build a directory of 100M+ people/companies.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capture high-intent, long-tail search traffic (e.g., "first name last name").](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
      - [**Model:** Emulates companies like RocketReach, which generates \~$100M/year from this strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [**Content Rationale:** Prospeo removed its blog after legal issues with LinkedIn and will not create new editorial content.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
      - [**Why:** Editorial content would be outranked by the programmatic pages and negatively impact Google's perception of the site.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
      - [**Execution:** The programmatic SEO build is handled in-house by a specialized team.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)

### GrowthX's Model: Content-Driven GEO

  - [GrowthX is an end-to-end content agency that integrates AI search visibility (GEO) with traditional SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [**Process:** An 8-week strategy sprint followed by ongoing content creation (\~5 pieces/week).](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [**Core Principle:** GEO is a direct outcome of creating high-quality editorial content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Team:** Founded by Marcel (ex-HashiCorp, Scale.ai, Deepgram) and includes experts like a former TechCrunch editor-in-chief.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [**Platform:** Uses a proprietary platform to manage workflows, with a client-facing version launching early next year.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### The Strategic Mismatch

  - [Prospeo's need was for AI search visibility *without* creating editorial content.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [GrowthX's model is built on content creation, making it an incompatible fit.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [**Prospeo's View:** Creating content would be a waste of money, as it would be outranked and negatively impact the programmatic strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [**GrowthX's View:** Content is a necessary input for AI models to surface information about a brand.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Share GrowthX's client examples (Monograph, Lovable, Ramp) with Hugo.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [**Tyler:** Re-engage with Hugo early next year upon the launch of GrowthX's new AI visibility product.](https://fathom.video/share/T13PCheg9_3qz_JnGfDg385xM_D4cCGr?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
